title: RIID-4813: Figma AI Agent Daemon Boundary Projection

blocks.text: This slice adds a daemon-local projection of Figma v1.22 AI Agent screen coverage. It records which screen facts are consumed by the daemon and which remain upstream contracts/control-plane/client/desktop ownership.

items: Stale agent-settings evidence refreshed to current `node-id=432:37336`
Onboarding wording uses fixture vocabulary for `리도`, `영실`, `홍도`, and `지원` rather than daemon-owned template entities.
Focused public Go tests cover daemon-relevant Figma nodes, manifest fields, cross-doc links, stale node ids, and fixture terminology.
architecture-docs runs the boundary test when the manifest, provider-runtime/context-map docs, CLI docs, or tests change.

blocks.text: This slice does not add daemon UI, Figma integration, SaaS endpoints, generated clients, provider install flow, provider CLI bundling, or new local daemon commands. Figma remains product evidence, and contracts/control-plane coverage remains upstream.
